meta.summary: yak 0.1-r56, a k-mer analyzer for assembly/read QV estimation and trio-aware k-mer analyses.
meta.description: yak 0.1-r56, a k-mer analyzer for assembly/read QV estimation and trio-aware k-mer analyses.

test: yak 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak <command> <argument>' >/dev/null && yak count 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak count' >/dev/null && yak qv 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak qv' >/dev/null && yak triobin 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak triobin' >/dev/null && yak trioeval 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak trioeval' >/dev/null && yak inspect 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: yak inspect' >/dev/null

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-yak-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; awk -v asm="$tmp/asm.fa" -v reads="$tmp/reads.fq" 'BEGIN{srand(1); nts="ACGT"; printf ">asm
" > asm; for(i=1;i<=2000;i++){b=substr(nts,int(rand()*4)+1,1); seq=seq b; printf b > asm} printf "
" > asm; for(r=1;r<=20;r++){start=1+int(rand()*1800); read=substr(seq,start,100); printf "@r%d
%s
+
", r, read > reads; for(j=1;j<=100;j++) printf "I" > reads; printf "
" > reads}}'; yak count -k21 -p10 -K100k -t1 -o "$tmp/reads.yak" "$tmp/reads.fq"; test -s "$tmp/reads.yak"; yak inspect "$tmp/reads.yak" > "$tmp/hist.tsv"; grep -F 'HS' "$tmp/hist.tsv" >/dev/null; yak qv -t1 "$tmp/reads.yak" "$tmp/asm.fa" > "$tmp/qv.tsv"; grep -F 'QV' "$tmp/qv.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -eu; tmp=/tmp/taf-yak-trio-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; awk -v pat="$tmp/pat.fa" -v mat="$tmp/mat.fa" -v asm="$tmp/asm.fa" 'BEGIN{srand(7); nts="ACGT"; printf ">pat
" > pat; for(i=1;i<=500;i++){b=substr(nts,int(rand()*4)+1,1); pseq=pseq b; printf b > pat} printf "
" > pat; printf ">mat
" > mat; for(i=1;i<=500;i++){b=substr(nts,int(rand()*4)+1,1); mseq=mseq b; printf b > mat} printf "
" > mat; printf ">pat_ctg
%s
>mat_ctg
%s
", pseq, mseq > asm}'; yak count -k21 -p10 -K100k -t1 -o "$tmp/pat.yak" "$tmp/pat.fa"; yak count -k21 -p10 -K100k -t1 -o "$tmp/mat.yak" "$tmp/mat.fa"; yak triobin -c1 -d1 -t1 "$tmp/pat.yak" "$tmp/mat.yak" "$tmp/asm.fa" > "$tmp/triobin.tsv"; grep -F 'pat_ctg' "$tmp/triobin.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'mat_ctg' "$tmp/triobin.tsv" >/dev/null; yak trioeval -c1 -d1 -n1 -t1 "$tmp/pat.yak" "$tmp/mat.yak" "$tmp/asm.fa" > "$tmp/trioeval.tsv"; grep -F 'S' "$tmp/trioeval.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'W' "$tmp/trioeval.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'H' "$tmp/trioeval.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: yak
upstream.citation: Heng Li, yak: Yet another k-mer analyzer
